turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan hello, main apni maa ke liye appointment lena chahta hoon. Unhe sugar ki problem hai — diabetes specialist chahiye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bilkul. Aapki maa ka naam kya hai aur unki umar kitni hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Theek hai. Hamare endocrinologist Dr. Priti Joshi available hain — kal dopahar 2 baje ka slot khali hai, ya phir shukravaar subah 10 baje. Kaunsa better rahega?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. Unka registered number kya hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done! Mrs. Sunanda Kulkarni ka appointment Dr. Priti Joshi ke saath kal 2 baje confirm ho gaya. Pichle reports aur medicines ki list saath leke aayein. SMS confirmation aayegi thodi der mein.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Koi baat nahin! Maa ji ka khayal rakhna.
